title: scMultiome-GRN pipeline parameters
description: Schema for command-line parameters of the scMultiome-GRN Nextflow pipeline.

input_path.description: Absolute or relative path to an input file or directory.

input.description: Path to the input Seurat RDS object containing the scMultiome data. The default points to the biological microglia dataset produced by data_demo/subsample_dataset.py.

outdir.description: Output directory for all pipeline results.

genome.description: Reference genome assembly for TSS annotation.

motif_db.description: Motif database identifier used by GimmeMotifs / CellOracle.

clustering.description: Column name in the Seurat object meta.data containing the cell-type clustering to use for GRN inference.

umap_key.description: Key in the Seurat object reductions slot containing the UMAP embedding to use.

clust2study.description: Specific cell-type cluster to study in the in silico perturbation module.

percentile.description: Percentile threshold used to prune weak network links. Isolated as a top-level parameter to showcase the -resume caching strategy.

n_top_edges.description: Maximum number of edges to keep after filtering.

ko_targets.description: Comma-separated list of transcription factor symbols to simulate as knockouts in the in silico perturbation module.

max_cpus.description: Maximum number of CPUs that can be requested by any single task.

max_memory.description: Maximum amount of memory that can be requested by any single task.

max_time.description: Maximum amount of time that can be requested by any single task.

container_r1.description: Container image URL for the first R-side process (PREP_R_SEURAT: scRNA + scATAC preprocessing with Seurat + Signac + SeuratDisk). Default points to the Sequera Wave image cr.seqera.io/dmouzo/pals-r-seurat:1.0.0 which ships R 4.4.3 + Seurat 5.4.0 + Signac 1.14.0 + SeuratDisk 0.0.9019 + utility R packages. Override with any container:// or docker:// URL.

container_r2.description: Container image URL for the second R-side process (PREP_R_CICERO: Cicero co-accessibility with cicero + monocle3 + EnsDb.Mmusculus.v79). Default points to the Sequera Wave image cr.seqera.io/dmouzo/pals-r-bioc:1.0.0 which ships R 4.4.3 + Bioconductor 3.19 + cicero + monocle3 + EnsDb.Mmusculus.v79. Override with any container:// or docker:// URL.

container_py.description: Container image URL for the Python-side process (INFER_GRN: CellOracle + GimmeMotifs). Default points to the GHCR image ghcr.io/dmouzo/pals-python-grn:1.0.0 which is a re-tag of kenjikamimoto126/celloracle_ubuntu:0.18.0 (CellOracle 0.18.0 + scanpy + anndata + gimmemotifs + goatools + adjustText). Override with any container:// or docker:// URL.

container_r.description: Legacy alias for container_r1. If set, the PREP_R_SEURAT process uses this URL instead of container_r1. Kept for back-compat with older invocations. New pipelines should use --container_r1.
